name: readGoogleDoc
description: Reads the content of a specific Google Document, optionally returning structured data.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document (from the URL).

format.description: Output format: 'text' (plain text), 'json' (raw API structure, complex), 'markdown' (experimental conversion).

maxLength.description: Maximum character limit for text output. If not specified, returns full document content. Use this to limit very large documents.

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to read. If not specified, reads the first tab (or legacy document.body for documents without tabs).
